channel.title: Festivals on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Festivals on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Cardwell UFO Festival: A Mysterious Event in Australia
item.description:
The Cardwell UFO Festival, held annually in Cardwell, Queensland, is Australia’s sole UFO festival. Established in 2014, it serves as a platform to discuss local unusual sightings and activities. The festival features entertainment, family activities, markets, food, and an alien-themed costume party. It also includes “The C-Files,” a forum for attendees to share their UFO experiences and other mysterious sightings. In 2017, the festival was recognized as a Top 10 Festival for UFO and Alien Lovers and one of Australia’s 7 Most Eyebrow-Raising Festivals.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cardwell_UFO_Festival
